markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss a potential content marketing engagement for Bardeen's new scraper product.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Bardeen's Pivot:** The company is relaunching as a pure scraper product, dropping complex features to focus on a "scrape, enrich, qualify, export" workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Model:** The agency builds automated content "machines" for specific archetypes (e.g., Webflow's integration pages) on a $30k setup + $15k/mo (1-yr) retainer.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**Engagement Blocker:** GrowthX's rigid 1-year contract conflicts with Bardeen's need for a trial to validate the new product's growth thesis before committing.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**New Product Lead:** Artem pitched a new process-discovery product to Jason's Ops lead, Andy, to solve their team's workflow visibility issues.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2785.0)

## Topics

### Bardeen's Product Pivot

  - [**New Focus:** A pure scraper tool, dropping complex features (e.g., integrations, orchestration) to simplify the product and marketing message.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [**Core Workflow:** "Scrape → Enrich → Qualify → Export."](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**New Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
      - [**$10/mo:** Basic plan for custom scraping; no premium features.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=989.0)
      - [**$49.99/mo:** Main plan.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
      - [**$1,000/scraper:** Custom scraper builds, requiring a yearly contract.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Business Goal:** Make the scraper product a profitable cash cow, distinct from the company's "unicorn" enterprise product.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**Current State:** \~$650k ARR, growing \~1%/week with no marketing effort.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Thesis:** The simpler product and website will drive significant growth.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### GrowthX's Content Marketing Model

  - [**Core Service:** Builds automated content "machines" for specific archetypes (e.g., listicles, use case guides).](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Process:** Master one content type to 9/10 quality before building the next machine.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2105.0)
  - [**Example:** For Webflow ($24k/mo), GrowthX built a machine delivering 30–50 integration pages/week.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [**Client Profile:** Requires a clear ICP and stable product direction; not a fit for companies still defining PMF.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

### Engagement Blocker: Contract Terms

  - [**GrowthX's Standard Terms:** $30k setup sprint + $15k/mo retainer on a 1-year contract.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [**Bardeen's Requirement:** A trial period to validate the new product's growth thesis before committing to a long-term contract.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**Resolution:** Jason will explore a trial option. A potential start date is December, after Bardeen's new website launches.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

### New Product Pitch: Process Discovery

  - [**Problem:** Jason's Ops team lacks visibility into workflows and cannot attribute work to specific clients.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2785.0)
  - [**Solution:** Artem's new product discovers and analyzes processes from user data (e.g., Amplitude), identifying deviations and bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
  - [**Key Feature: Entity Extraction:** Automatically links user actions to a central business entity (e.g., a "deal" or "account"), enabling cross-tool, cross-person tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=3009.0)
  - [**Action:** Jason will connect Artem with Andy, the Ops lead, to explore a pilot.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2785.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Artem:** Grant Jason Amplitude access to review current analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [**Jason:** Investigate a trial contract option for Bardeen.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [**Jason:** Connect Artem with Andy (Ops lead) to discuss a pilot for the process-discovery product.](https://fathom.video/share/47C23kR2TfX-CEKsZGNtp42xmzNJNrGB?tab=summary&timestamp=2785.0)
